productDisplayName: Puma Men Super Elevate White Casual Shoes
description: The puma Super Elevate is a stylish cross-trainer that makes a trendy statement, combining superior performance. This sneaker is great for regular wear as it ensures superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Upper Synthetic leather upper for durability and protection Lace-up front with padded tongue and collar for snug Fit Textile lining for extra comfort puma formstripe on the sides Brand name embossed on the tongue and cat logo on the toe counter and behind heel Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Outsole TPR outsole for firm support and durability Mutli-directional lugs for enhanced grip and traction Elevated heel for ergonomic comfort Midfoot shank for inner arch support Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
